business.description: Authoring workflow behavior visible to users who ask for large requirements contract generation.

governance.description: Process boundaries for confirmation status, renderer responsibility, checkpoint commit isolation, final index cleanup, reverse-audit stage separation, delivery verification, and closeout integrity.

viewRows.title: Scale assessment routes authoring mode
Checkpoint commit and resume safety
Pre-render gate blocks unresolved source issues
Final index cleanup after retention decision
Reverse audit stage separation and proof plan authoring
Current-target strictness to delivery verification and closeout
Command target collection and trace closure integrity
Canonical surface reconciliation and legacy denial
Controlled record_closed and evidence trust states
Semantic kernel first and ID freeze
Full contract reconciliation and kernel amendment
Single-responsibility reverse audit CLI split
Stage-boundary regression gate
Target modification paths confirmation gate
AI-TDD error-case coverage manifest gate
Authoring mode decision flow
Proof state promotion flow
Evidence trust boundary flow
Semantic kernel materialization flow
Stage-specific audit verdict flow
Checkpoint interruption and staged-file edge cases
False positive audit and planned-proof edge cases
Command, self-certification, legacy, and premature-closeout edge cases
Semantic kernel drift and amendment edge cases
Reverse audit stage-boundary edge cases
Target modification path visibility edge cases
AI-TDD error-case coverage edge cases
Checkpoint automation boundaries
Audit stage and proof-state boundaries
Current-target and closeout boundaries
Command target and trace closure boundaries
Canonical surface and legacy denial boundaries
Terminal closeout and evidence trust boundaries
Semantic kernel and checkpoint materialization boundaries
Single-responsibility reverse audit and closeout boundaries
Target modification path confirmation boundary
AI-TDD error-case coverage boundary

rows.intent: Add read-only scale assessment before large source-document authoring.
Automate checkpoint planning, run/resume, per-checkpoint commit receipts, and pre-render global consistency.
Run deterministic pre-render definition drilldown before HTML confirmation.
Render current/target comparison and target modification paths as confirmation-page hard surfaces.
Cover scale routing, checkpoint ordering, commit gates, global consistency, and semantic-kernel-first flows.
Prevent confirmable pages that hide current/target comparison or target modification paths.
Keep the source document, implementationConfirmation, current/target map, and target modification paths aligned.
Add the single-responsibility contract confirmability audit CLI for render report, hash, blocking issue, and confirmation phrase checks.
Add the single-responsibility implementation readiness audit CLI with notValidForCloseout semantics.
Add the delivery verification audit CLI that validates deliveryReadiness, current-pass trace closure, command targets, canonical surfaces, and legacy substitution denial.
Add the closeout integrity audit CLI that accepts only current delivery_verification=verified and controls record_closed authorization.
Convert the legacy reverse audit entry into a compatibility wrapper with deprecatedGenericPass and notValidForCloseout metadata.
Share parsing and issue helpers without sharing stage verdict authority or generic PASS semantics.
Document stage-specific reverse audit responsibilities, verdict vocabularies, exit semantics, and wrapper deprecation rules.
Make the skill invoke stage-specific audit CLIs instead of treating reverse_audit_contract.js as one global authority.
Add regression coverage for stage-specific audit CLI verdicts, wrapper deprecation metadata, and non-closeout semantics.
Assert the skill contract names stage-specific reverse audit commands and rejects global generic PASS closeout semantics.
Consume implementation readiness audit output only for implementation readiness and mark it invalid for closeout.
Require delivery verification and closeout integrity reports before allowing delivery closeout decisions.
Reject confirmability, readiness, wrapper PASS, self-certification, and non-current evidence as closeout proof.
Restrict record_closed writes to closeout integrity after current delivery verification.
Add schema support for delivery verification, closeout integrity, and stage-specific audit event metadata.
Record stage CLI capability checks for confirmability, readiness, delivery verification, and closeout integrity.
Record wrapper deprecation and non-closeout compatibility evidence.
Record regression checks proving wrong-stage verdicts cannot satisfy delivery verification or closeout.
Add ContractExecutionManifest.errorCaseCoverage and fail-closed completeness checks for every FAIL-* and EDGE-* mapping.
Add regression coverage proving missing FAIL/EDGE NEG, acceptance, and edge linkage mappings block AI-TDD contract completeness.

policies: Generated assessment, progress, receipt, and decision-packet artifacts must be requirement-scoped and cleaned according to retention strategy.

Only current source hash, implementationConfirmation hash, context hash, checkpoint commit hash, current resolution ledger, current requirement record hash, current command run refs, current evidence hashes, and current closeout attempt id may satisfy the gate.

rows.oracle: Acceptance fixtures prove checkpoint automation, current/target visibility, target modification path visibility, and audit-stage fail-closed behavior.
Checkpoint interruption, staged-file, pre-render blocker, and trace-count false-positive fixtures fail closed with explicit blockers.
Reverse-audit stage confusion, planned-vs-executed proof, wrapper misuse, and generic PASS misuse are rejected as readiness or closeout evidence.
Command target, trace self-certification, legacy substitution, and premature record_closed cases are blocked by target-state gates.
Kernel drift and direct prose mutation cases require kernel amendment and re-materialization before render.
Missing explicit targetModificationPaths blocks confirmability and is visible in render report.
AI-TDD ContractExecutionManifest.errorCaseCoverage blocks missing FAIL/EDGE NEG linkage, missing edge linkage, and generic-only acceptance coverage.
Renderer fixtures block confirmability when current/target or target modification path hard surfaces are missing.
End-to-end AI-TDD gate report contains contractExecutionManifest.errorCaseCoverage and blocks readiness when any FAIL/EDGE mapping is missing.

record_closed.description: Terminal closeout event written only after current delivery_verification=verified and closeout_integrity=accepted.
Terminal closeout event written only after current delivery_verification=verified and closeout_integrity=accepted.

confirmInstruction:
确认以上范围进入下一阶段
